productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Black Outback Casual Shoes
description: Take adventure to the next level with these outback shoes from adidas. The sleek design and high performance features stand by you outdoors better and for longer. Team these with jeans and t-shirts for a cool, casual look.UpperSuede upper with canvas overlays for enhanced durability adidas patented 3-Stripe design on the sides for enhanced support and to exude the brand’s belief in performanceLace-ups for a snug and customised FitSlightly padded tongue and collar for all-day comfortBrand name embossed on the tongue and lateral sideMidsoleRubber midsole and padded footbedOutsoleTextured TPU outsole with terraced lugs for extra grip and traction Outsole reinforced onto the upper as a toe guard for enhanced protectionshoe careClean the upper using a suede brushDo not store in direct sunlight
